message:
feat(e2e): add compare subcommand + fix undo-log compilation (bd-2als.3.2)

- Add `compare` CLI subcommand to realdb-e2e: three-tier equivalence
  oracle with --json output, human-readable diagnostics, and proper
  exit codes (0=match, 1=mismatch, 2=error)
- Fix borrow checker error in MemDatabase::clear_table (clone before
  push_undo to avoid double borrow)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for MemDatabase::delete_at and MemDbUndoOp
  (not yet wired to VDBE opcodes)
- Fix take_transaction() match to handle Result return type
- Include other agents' concurrent work: undo-log system, batch_runner,
  perf_runner, oplog improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
